subject: Bump 1.6.4 version for Frankfurt maintenance release
commit_message:
Bump 1.6.4 version for Frankfurt maintenance release

This new version includes minor fixes for ue case support

Issue-ID: INT-1652

Signed-off-by: mrichomme <morgan.richomme@orange.com>
Change-Id: I773d78906c5b32678e58eafe825ba12059ff52cf

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:

> @Fiachra any idea on the error on 5Gbulk test
> https://gating-results.onap.eu/results//109930-1/xtesting-smoke-usecases-robot/5gbulkpm/5gbulkpm/log.html#

Hi,

I just ran it on a deployment which is less than a day old and it all passed.
Looks like the SFTP server isn't coming up properly for some reason.

Has it been failing regularly?

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

not in daily, results are pretty stable and good
100% OK on the last 20 attempts on the daily frankfurt http://testresults.opnfv.org/onap/api/v1/results?&case_name=5gbulkpm&last=20&pod=onap_daily_pod4_frankfurt-ONAP-oom

this patch just includes minor changes in testsuite.that is why I was surprised
Moreover it was the first time I saw such errors.
